top_signals.title: ISM coasters and mini bulkers – Week 21
top_signals.summary: Activity has slackened somewhat on the South Atlantic Supramax/Ultramax shipping market, with June vessel count gradually rising.   Source: International Seaborne Market
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Kalshi backs prediction markets lobby group with former Trump official
top_signals.summary: "We’re not going to be outspent or out-organized by entrenched interests protecting their monopolies," said John Bivona, head of government relations at Kalshi.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: U.S. Coast Guard Commissions Cutter Honoring 9/11 Hero
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Coast Guard commissioned its newest Fast Response Cutter, USCGC Vincent Danz (WPC 1162), for official entry into its service fleet during a ceremony held in New York City on Friday.The Vice Commandant of the Coast Guard, Vice Adm. Thomas Allan, presided over the ceremony.
